title: Basses vallées angevines
subtitle: A French case study in high nature value farming
description: A case study of flood meadows near Angers, France, highlighting extensive grazing, mowing practices and conservation measures that maintain high levels of biodiversity on Ramsar and Natura 2000 sites. It examines agri-environment schemes, local marketing initiatives, and challenges in sustaining high nature value farming through policy frameworks and producer associations.
